description: A manager of a large hand-harvested fruit operation needs to coordinate crews, equipment, and transport across multiple ranches.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the daily harvest plan, including which crews are assigned to which fields.
Dispatch buses to pick up harvest crews and transport them to the correct fields.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends dispatch orders to the transport provider.

nodes.task_description: Coordinate the delivery of empty bins to the fields and the pickup of full bins for transport to the packing house.

expected_outcome.value: Agent manages the real-time logistics of bin movement.
